uplink.description: TTN example 1: full payload (flags=0x0003) — hydrostatic pressure 0.0125732421875 bar (1.2573 kPa), 23.5039 C, battery 3.115 V, device 811
uplink._note: Oracle: reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure 0.0125732421875 bar, temperature 23.50390625 C, battery 3.115 V, device_id 811. bar->kPa (x100) rounded to 4dp -> 1.2573; degC rounded to 4dp -> 23.5039; battery V to 3dp -> 3.115.

uplink.description: Synthetic full payload (flags=0x0003): hydrostatic pressure 0.5 bar (50 kPa), 20.0 C, battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Oracle: in-bounds words crafted so reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure 0.5 bar, temperature 20 C, battery 3.6 V. pressure word=0.5*8192+32768=36864 (0x9000), temp word=20*256+32768=37888 (0x9400), battery=3600 (0x0E10). bar->kPa (x100); degC and V unchanged.

uplink.description: Pressure block only (flags=0x0001): 0.0 bar (0 kPa), -10.0 C, no battery
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream yields 0.0 bar and -10.0 C; pressure word=32768 (0x8000) -> 0 bar (in-bounds non-negative hydrostatic pressure), temp word=-10*256+32768=30208 (0x7600).

uplink.description: TTN example 2: battery-only payload (flags=0x0002): battery 3.115 V
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream yields battery 3.115 V; pressure block flag clear. groundwater atLeastOne (water.pressure) is satisfied by the other data vectors.
Header version byte must be 2 (Decentlab protocol v2).
